footer.aboutText: ImmoV2 is the first platform dedicated to the Cameroonian real estate market. Find and post land listings with confidence.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.editorText: ImmoV2 is a platform connecting sellers and buyers of land properties in Cameroon.
legal.hostingText: This site is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States.
legal.intellectualPropertyText: All content on ImmoV2 (text, images, logo, source code) is protected by copyright. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior authorization.
legal.responsibilityText: ImmoV2 acts as an intermediary platform. The platform cannot be held responsible for the content of listings published by users, nor for transactions between parties. Each user is responsible for the accuracy of the information they publish.
legal.disputeResolutionText: In case of dispute, parties agree to seek an amicable solution before any legal action. Failing agreement, the competent courts of Douala, Cameroon, shall have jurisdiction.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: ImmoV2 is committed to protecting the privacy of its users. This policy describes the data we collect, why we collect it, and how we use it.
privacy.dataCollectedText: We collect the following data during your registration and use of the platform:

dataList.listings: Content of published listings (text, photos, videos)
dataList.verification: Identity documents (national ID or passport) for seller verification

purposeList.contact: Facilitate contact between sellers and buyers
purposeList.alerts: Send email alerts for saved searches

privacy.storageText: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, your data is anonymized within 30 days in accordance with our soft delete procedure.
privacy.rightsText: Under Cameroonian data protection law, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your data. To exercise these rights, contact us at contact@immov2.cm.
privacy.cookiesText: ImmoV2 only uses essential cookies for site operation (authentication session). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are used.
privacy.securityText: Data is stored on secure servers (Supabase, hosted on AWS in Europe). Passwords are hashed and communications encrypted via HTTPS.
privacy.contactText: For any questions regarding your personal data: contact@immov2.cm
